overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, walking through a dark neon-lit urban environment at night. The player moves from an outdoor alley with burning barrels through a plaza and enters an indoor bar with vibrant green and red neon lighting.

concrete wall with circular graffiti art and weathered texture
massive cylindrical pillars supporting overhead highway or structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow dark alley with a burning barrel on the left providing the primary light source. The camera moves forward past graffiti-covered walls toward an opening with concrete support pillars visible in the distance.

green and red neon sign for El Pollo restaurant mounted on building

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider plaza with multiple burning barrels providing warm light. A wooden food stall with people sitting occupies the left side while a large digital billboard becomes visible ahead. The camera continues forward through the scattered pedestrians.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a yellow staircase on the left while the digital billboard remains visible ahead. After passing the last burning barrel, the player turns and ascends the stairs, moving past construction barriers toward an upper walkway.

walking through doorway into the Cirrus bar, transitioning from outdoor to indoor

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper walkway and entering a neon-lit bar through glass doors

notable_agents.action: person standing near the bar entrance smoking

entered.detail: glass doorway with green interior lighting and metal frame
large red neon sign with white text reading CIRRUS above the entrance

segments.scene_description: At the top of the stairs, the camera moves along a walkway toward a building entrance with distinctive green lighting. The red neon 'Cirrus' sign marks the bar entrance. The player approaches and enters through the glass doors, transitioning from the dark street to the illuminated interior.

passing by bar counter with multiple digital screens displaying advertisements

patron standing near red high-top table looking at phone

multiple hanging screens displaying various advertisements and news
tall tables with red surfaces and matching stools near the wall

segments.scene_description: Inside the Cirrus bar, the environment is dominated by green neon underlighting on the bar counter and red accent lighting. Multiple digital screens hang from the ceiling displaying advertisements. The camera moves through the space past red high-top tables and patrons, with the bartender visible behind the counter.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, dark alleyway into a bustling urban plaza and up toward an elevated walkway. It begins in a narrow passage where the flickering glow of a burning barrel illuminates graffiti-covered walls, moving forward toward a distant opening framed by concrete pillars. As the camera emerges from the alley, the space expands into a wider plaza filled with scattered pedestrians, warm light from multiple barrels, and a wooden food stall situated beneath a towering digital billboard. The scene then shifts as the camera passes the final fire source and turns toward a yellow staircase on the left. Finally, the perspective ascends the stairs, moving past construction barriers to reach an upper walkway under the glow of the city lights.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark urban exterior into the vibrant, neon-drenched interior of a cyberpunk bar. It begins atop a set of stairs, gliding along a walkway toward a building entrance marked by a glowing red Cirrus sign and distinctive green lighting. As the camera approaches and passes through the glass doors, the scene shifts from the shadows of the street to a brightly illuminated indoor space. The environment then expands to reveal a bar dominated by green underlighting and red accents, with digital advertisement screens hanging from the ceiling. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the venue, passing red high-top tables and patrons before arriving near the bartender behind the counter.
